note: DB56 t403 deterministic SET-UNION fallback offline reproduction. All LLM candidates were INNER-JOIN intersections; the synthesized UNION enters the normal pool and wins. Deterministic; no live LLM; schema-generic (no DB/test hardcoding).
question: List patient identifiers that appear either in appointments or billing claims.
synthesized_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT patient_id AS patient_id FROM appointments WHERE patient_id IS NOT NULL
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT patient_id AS patient_id FROM billing_claims WHERE patient_id IS NOT NULL

synthesis_metadata.reason: no existing candidate satisfied the either/or set provenance; synthesized a separable UNION over the grounded source alternatives
